title: Summer surface temperature and socio-economic inequity in Greater Melbourne: code and processed data
description: Google Earth Engine workflow and processed data underpinning the analysis of summer land surface temperature and socio-economic inequity across 359 SA2 units of Greater Melbourne, Australia (2000-2024), using open Landsat Collection 2 imagery, the 2021 Australian Census, SEIFA, and SRTM elevation. Accompanies a manuscript currently under peer review.

creators.name: Fu, Hongjin
creators.affiliation: School of Engineering, Monash University Malaysia
